title: Entity Base (composes _meta.schema.json#/$defs/baseFields)
description: Entity composition base. Every type-specific entity schema (entity.aircraft-model.schema.json etc.) MUST compose this via allOf + $ref AND set unevaluatedProperties: false ON THE LEAF (NOT here). Per JSON Schema 2020-12 spec, unevaluatedProperties evaluates against annotations in its own scope only; placing it on this base schema would reject leaf-defined properties when the base is referenced as an allOf branch (fixed in Phase 3 plan 03-01 Wave 1 — see SUMMARY.md deviations). NEVER use additionalProperties: false (Pitfall #1) anywhere. Adds the entity-only fields (type, schema_version, version, i18n, tags, version_history) on top of the universal baseFields (id, provenance, confidence, source) defined in _meta.schema.json. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Each leaf type schema overrides this with `const`. Examples: 'AircraftSystem', 'Material', 'Person'.

schema_version.description: D-20 per-record schema version (semver). Phase 3 validator rejects records older than N-1.

version.description: Per-record version. Defaults to 1 (implicit). Bumped each time the record is meaningfully revised (D-15 internalized has_revision).

i18n.description: D-14 bilingual fields. label is required on every entity; full_text is optional but if present must be complete (both zh + en strings).

tags.description: Free-form kebab-case tags for faceting. NOT for ontological relationships — those are relation YAMLs.

version_history.description: D-15. Internalized has_revision (D-07). Absence implies version == 1. Mandatory once version > 1. NOTE: items.version is an integer revision counter (not a semver string); the per-record schema_version field above carries the semver. This reconciles the D-15 'semver string' wording in 02-CONTEXT.md — the integer counter matches the top-level `version` field.

version.description: Revision counter matching the top-level `version` field at the time of this revision.

change_summary.description: ≥1 sentence describing the revision (≥20 chars). Empty / placeholder summaries fail validation by design.
